attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.PROJECT_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.CUSTOMER_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.PROJECT_RELATIONSHIP_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.CUSTOMER_BILL_SPLIT, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.BILL_TO_ADDRESS_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.INV_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.INV_RATE_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.INV_RATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.INV_EXCHANGE_RATE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.ALLOW_INV_USER_RATE_TYPE_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.BILL_ANOTHER_PROJECT_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.RECEIVER_TASK_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.RECORD_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.PROJECT_PARTY_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.RETENTION_LEVEL_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.DEFAULT_TOP_TASK_CUST_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS,
 (
 select PROJECT_ID ,CUSTOMER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS
 minus
 select PROJECT_ID ,CUSTOMER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PROJECT_ID = STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.PROJECT_ID and ACM.CUSTOMER_ID=STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.CUSTOMER_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CUSTOMERS.REFRESH_DATETIME
